items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario where the calendar shows wrong availability context. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete details or outcomes related to this specific scenario, nor does it demonstrate how the system handles such a case. The linked use cases and prior steps indicate gaps in functionality that have not been addressed, leading to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this persona scenario.
